heading: Disbursement of moneys
label: 541f Disbursement of moneys
text: All moneys received under the provisions of this chapter shall be paid into the Treasury of the United States and distributed in the same manner as provided in and sections 437, 438, and 439 of title 48.section 191 of this title1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 437, 438, and 439 of title 48, referred to in text, were repealed by , , .Pub. L. 86–252, § 173 Stat. 490Sept. 9, 1959
amendments: References in TextSections 437, 438, and 439 of title 48, referred to in text, were repealed by , , .Pub. L. 86–252, § 173 Stat. 490Sept. 9, 1959
